sheet_name: แบบขยายบันได ST.3
source_image: image/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_03/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_03_หน้า23.png
view_title: แบบขยาย 2 -- wall-mounted handrail bracket detail, 1:10

elements.description: ราวบันไดไม้เนื้อแข็ง 2"x4" วางนอน -- hardwood handrail, 2x4 inch, mounted to a wall via a steel bracket (not a floor-mounted newel post like view2)
เหล็กแบน (FB) ขนาด 1" หนา 6 มม ทาสีน้ำมัน -- flat steel bar bracket, 1 inch wide, 6mm thick, oil-painted
เหล็ก PL-4.5 mm. BOLT Ø10 mm. -- steel plate, 4.5mm thick, bolted with 10mm diameter bolt, at the handrail-to-bracket connection
เหล็ก PL-4.5 mm. BOLT Ø10 mm. -- second steel plate at the wall-mounting end

warnings: Third of 4 views on this page; this wall-mounted bracket detail was NOT present on house #4's equivalent stair-detail sheet (house #4 only had newel-post and tread/riser details) -- this appears to be a new detail specific to this house's stair design (likely where the stair runs alongside a wall rather than an open edge, requiring a wall bracket instead of a floor-mounted post).
